_description: Synthesizer tuner — overrides calibration constants for known model ceiling metrics. Pass via --tuner scripts/calibration_tuner.json

tuning_suggestions.mouth_to_iod_ratio/increase: Model ceiling confirmed (GT=1.95, synthetic ceiling ~1.65). Try alternate tokens: (prominent lips:1.3), (wide smile:1.2), (generous mouth:1.2). Further weight increases or guidance changes have shown no improvement.
